response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a Staff/Senior Software Engineer with over 15 years of professional experience across embedded systems, high-throughput microservices, geo-platforms, and AI-agent infrastructure — a profile that far exceeds the entry-to-mid-level scope of this role. While his TypeScript, React, AWS, and Kubernetes skills technically satisfy the requirements and nice-to-haves, placing a Staff engineer into a Junior/Mid individual contributor seat creates a near-certain retention risk and is unlikely to serve either party well. Compounding the issue, he is currently based in São Paulo, Brazil, which conflicts directly with the role's high on-site presence requirement.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and full-stack proficiency validated across multiple production environments (Optilyz, re:cinq, RIDE Capital)
Covers nearly all nice-to-have qualifications: AWS CDK, Kubernetes, and active LLM/AI-agent infrastructure work at current employer
Strong software-craftsmanship fundamentals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) align with the role's clean-architecture interest
concerns: Severely overqualified: Staff/Senior-level background with 15+ years is a substantial mismatch for a Junior/Mid individual contributor role
Location conflict: currently in São Paulo, Brazil; role demands high on-site presence with no indication of relocation or remote accommodation
Relational database exposure is thin — PostgreSQL is not mentioned; primary database experience is MongoDB and general SQL, leaving a gap in the preferred stack
